name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express is located at 7921 Biscayne Blvd, Miami, FL 33138 in the Upper East Side neighborhood. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 380 reviews. Call +1 305-758-8526.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical retail locations that provide fast access to emergency cash and related financial products. The company has grown to operate stores in multiple states, though the website indicates some locations are subject to state-specific service restrictions. Their business model centers on serving consumers who need immediate funds outside traditional banking channels. ACE's primary service offerings include installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, tax services, and online loans. The company advertises same-day or next-day funding capabilities for their loan products, positioning themselves as a rapid-access solution for emergency financial needs. They also offer prepaid cards and business services, indicating a diversified approach to consumer and small business finance. ACE distinguishes itself through their physical store network, which provides in-person service and immediate cash access—a significant advantage over purely online competitors. Their multi-service model (loans, check cashing, money transfers, tax services, bill payments) means customers can consolidate multiple financial needs at one location. The company maintains dedicated customer service phone lines and email support for both general and online loan inquiries. The Hurricane Ida reference and back-to-school promotion suggest older website content. Without transparency on pricing or detailed terms, consumers should verify specific product availability and costs for their state before applying.
pros: Multiple service types available at single locations (loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services)
Same-day or next-day loan funding advertised for emergency cash needs
Physical store locations provide in-person service and immediate cash access
Online loan application option available for digital-first consumers
Dedicated customer service support with separate phone lines for different inquiry types
Operates across multiple states with established store network
Title loans available for customers with vehicle collateral
cons: Website contains broken location pages (404 errors) making it difficult to verify current store locations and services
No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed on visible website content
State-specific service restrictions limit product availability by location
Appears to be older website content (Hurricane Ida reference, back-to-school promotions)
Limited transparency on loan terms, repayment schedules, and eligibility requirements
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash within 24 hours for emergency expenses
Customers who prefer in-person service and immediate cash pickup over online-only lenders
Vehicle owners seeking title-based loans with existing collateral
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in areas with physical store locations who need immediate emergency cash and prefer in-person transactions. Primary caveat: website usability is poor (broken pages), pricing is completely opaque, and service availability varies significantly by state—verify eligibility and costs for your location before applying.
